utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item includes the requested details: type of coverage, relevant specifics, and associated costs. Health coverage specifies physical and mental coverage, plan name, monthly and annual costs, and extra features. Property coverage specifies home/contents coverage for specific equipment, monthly and annual costs. Travel coverage specifies type of travel insurance, monthly and annual costs, and scope. Additional services lists the state (none) and mentions an optional service with cost. Total budget includes monthly and annual breakdown with discount info. All are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main items: health_coverage, property_coverage, and travel_coverage. For health_coverage, it specifies 'InsurePlus Standard Plan (Physical + Mental)'. This corresponds to two separate ratings in the ground truth: under primary_health_coverage -> physical_health -> 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 9) and under primary_health_coverage -> mental_health -> 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 8). For property_coverage, 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' matches property_protection -> home_content -> 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' which has a rating of 9. For travel_coverage, 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' matches mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance -> 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' which has a rating of 10. There are no additional services chosen, so no mapping is needed for those.
